name: MMDeepResearch-Bench
aliases: MMDeepResearch-Bench: A Benchmark for Multimodal Deep Research Agents
organization: Academic benchmark authors [uncertain exact institution list]
current_status: Recent arXiv benchmark for multimodal deep research agents; public code and leaderboard availability are [uncertain].
positioning: Benchmark for evaluating deep research agents that must retrieve, reason over, and cite multimodal evidence in long-form reports.
boundary_notes: Included because it extends text-oriented deep-research evaluation to multimodal evidence, which is central for scientific and technical research reports using figures, charts, images, and documents.
execution_environment: Benchmark of multimodal deep-research tasks described in arXiv and mirrored on Hugging Face paper pages.
human_roles: Humans define research tasks and expected multimodal evidence criteria.
Humans inspect report quality and benchmark failures.
Judge-model outputs require human sanity checks for high-stakes use.
autonomy_rationale: The benchmark evaluates agents that perform multi-step retrieval and synthesis, but tasks remain predefined and validation is benchmark-based rather than real-world scientific validation.
iteration_loop: Deep research agents may perform iterative searching and report refinement; the exact benchmark loop is [uncertain].
stopping_and_guardrails: Tasks are bounded to benchmark prompts.
Reports are evaluated with multimodal evidence and citation-quality metrics.
Judge-model grading should be audited for critical claims.
known_failure_modes: Citing sources that do not support the visual claim.
Ignoring images, figures, or charts despite their relevance.
Overreliance on text snippets when visual evidence is decisive.
metrics: FLAE visual evidence faithfulness component [uncertain expansion]
TRACE citation and reasoning component [uncertain expansion]
MOSAIC multimodal report quality component [uncertain expansion]
Composite benchmark score [uncertain exact weighting beyond secondary summary]
baselines: dedicated deep research agents [uncertain exact list]
validation_strength: Primary arXiv paper and Hugging Face paper metadata; code, data release, and leaderboard were not verified.
evaluation_limitations: Recent benchmark with limited independent replication.
Judge-model evaluation can inherit model biases.
Exact code/data availability was not verified.
Multimodal evidence grading is difficult to audit at scale.
code_url: [uncertain] No official code repository was verified during this pass.
dataset_url: [uncertain] No official dataset page was verified beyond paper metadata.
leaderboard_url: [uncertain] No official public leaderboard was identified.
source_quality: Primary arXiv paper plus Hugging Face paper metadata; some metric details cross-checked from secondary benchmark summaries.
evaluated_by: [uncertain] No external benchmark-of-benchmark evaluation was verified.
milestones: 2026: Hugging Face paper page indexed the benchmark.
adoption_signals: Independent adoption metrics were not verified.
supersession_notes: No official successor or replacement was identified.
real_world_applications: Evaluating research agents that need to analyze figures, charts, screenshots, and documents.
Studying failure modes in visual evidence use.
users: scientific and technical report automation teams
AI safety and hallucination evaluation researchers
deployment_constraints: Requires retrieval over image-rich sources and citation tracking.
Needs careful judge-model calibration and human review for high-stakes settings.
cost_and_runtime: [uncertain] Multi-step multimodal research is likely more expensive than text-only deep research, but no canonical budget was verified.
scientific_integrity_risks: Citations that support text but not image-derived conclusions.
Benchmark scores overstating reliability in real scientific workflows.
security_and_safety_risks: Automated browsing and retrieval over untrusted media.
Misinterpretation of scientific images or charts.
Use in high-stakes research without expert review.
mitigations: Require source-level provenance for each visual claim.
Audit judge-model scores with human reviewers.
Separate retrieval, visual interpretation, and synthesis scores.
Retain screenshots or source snapshots for reproducibility.
policy_relevance: Relevant to responsible deployment of deep research agents, citation integrity, and evaluation of multimodal evidence claims.
